task_completion.description: Create a 'Done' Activity log named 'Winter rye cover crop burndown' at 7:00 AM with the specified notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log entry in the farmOS Field Kit app with the title 'Winter rye cover crop burndown', type 'Activity', status marked as 'Done', time set to '7:00 AM', and notes containing 'Applied glyphosate 32 oz/ac to winter rye and hairy vetch cover crop mix...'

task_completion.description: Create a 'Done' Activity log named 'Grid soil sampling Field 5' at 9:00 AM with the specified notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log entry in the app with the title 'Grid soil sampling Field 5', type 'Activity', status marked as 'Done', time set to '9:00 AM', and notes containing 'Collected 2.5-acre grid samples, 8 soil cores per grid...'

task_completion.description: Create a 'Done' Input log named 'Corn planting Field 7 East 32500 population' at 11:30 AM with the specified notes.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Done' Input log named 'Corn planting Field 8 32500 population' at 2:00 PM with the specified notes.

task_completion.description: Create a 'NOT Done' Observation log named 'Field 7 East planting quality check' at 5:30 PM with the specified notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a log entry in the app with the title 'Field 7 East planting quality check', type 'Observation', status marked as 'NOT Done' (or unchecked/pending), time set to '5:30 PM', and notes containing 'Dug seeds in 3 locations to verify depth and spacing...'

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the farmOS Field Kit Android app interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the farmOS Field Kit app UI, not a web browser or a different application.

integrity.description: Ensure there are no terminal windows or scripts used to inject the logs directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal emulators, ADB shells, or Python scripts should be visible performing the task.

integrity.description: Verify that the logs appear in the app's native log list or detail views.
integrity.visual_evidence: The logs should be visible within the farmOS Field Kit's list of logs or individual log view screens, indicating they were actually saved in the app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating 5 specific logs in the farmOS Field Kit app. Log types include Activity, Input, and Observation. The pass threshold is 80 points (4 of 5 logs). The agricultural practices described (e.g., 32,500 seeds/acre, Pioneer P1197AM, 32 oz/ac glyphosate, 10-34-0 starter fertilizer at 5 gal/ac, 2.5-acre grid sampling with 8 cores, 99.2% singulation) are realistic and evidence-based. Note: Midwest Labs soil test turnaround time is actually 2 days, not 5 business days as stated in the prompt, but the agent should still input the text exactly as requested in the task description.
